name: chip-input
description: Tag input block allowing creation and removal of tags.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Called with the updated tag array when tags are added or removed.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text shown in the text field when no tags have been added.

props.name: label
props.description: Label text displayed above the input.

props.name: error
props.description: Error message displayed below the input; also activates the error border colour.

props.name: helperText
props.description: Helper text displayed below the input when there is no error.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables adding new tags and hides the remove button on existing tags.

props.name: maxTags
props.description: Maximum number of tags allowed. The text input is hidden once this limit is reached.

props.name: size
props.description: Size preset controlling minimum height and chip row padding.

props.name: containerStyle
props.description: Style applied to the outer container.

examples.label: Example 1
examples.code:
<ChipInput
  label="Skills"
  value={skills}
  onValueChange={setSkills}
  placeholder="Add a skill…"
  maxTags={5}
/>
